description: Borrower makes a partial or full repayment on an outstanding loan. The repaid amount is burned from the borrower's balance (not transferred — burned). State effect: LoanRecord.Repaid += amount; total_supply -= amount; total_loan_principal -= amount when fully repaid; LoanRecord.Status = LoanRepaid when Repaid >= Principal. Vig (accrued interest) is repaid via separate scrip:loan-vig-accrue messages — this operation covers principal only. The borrower initiates this message; the operator signs it after verifying the borrower has sufficient balance. Only the exchange operator may emit this message.

args.name: loan_id
args.description: Loan ID being repaid. Must reference an Active loan record.

args.name: amount
args.description: Repayment amount in micro-tokens. Must not exceed (principal - already_repaid). Burned from borrower balance on application.

validation: loan_id MUST reference a known, Active LoanRecord.
Borrower balance MUST be >= amount at the time the operator signs (verified before emission).
Antecedent MUST be the scrip:loan-mint message for loan_id (the root of the loan chain).
